publication/title: External validation of risk prediction platforms for pancreatic fistula after pancreatoduodenectomy using nomograms and artificial intelligence.

evaluation/method:
* **Evaluation Strategy**: External validation.
  * The study used an external validation cohort consisting of 1,576 patients from three different centers to evaluate the predictive ability of the nomogram and AI models.
  * The individual risk scores for POPF were calculated using each platform by Samsung Medical Center.
  * The predictive ability was evaluated using a receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve and the area under the curve (AUC).
  * Backward elimination was performed to obtain the optimal predictive value of the AI model by selecting features that had no significant prognostic value.
evaluation/measure:
Performance Metrics:
* **Nomogram**:
  * AUC: 0.679 (95% CI, 0.645–0.713; P < 0.001)
* **AI Model**:
  * AUC: 0.672 (95% CI, 0.637–0.706; P < 0.001)
  * AUC values with backward elimination: 0.672 (13 variables), 0.667 (14 variables), 0.663 (15 variables), 0.660 (16 variables)
evaluation/comparison:
* **Comparison Performed**: Yes
  * **List of tools/baselines**:
    * **Nomogram**: The AI model was compared to a nomogram model. The nomogram included 6 preoperative variables: sex, body mass index (BMI), the American Society of Anesthesiology physical status (ASA PS) classification, serum albumin, tumor location, and the diameter of the main pancreatic duct (MPD).
    * **Other Nomograms**: The authors also mentioned other nomograms for comparison, such as those by Huang et al. and Suzuki et al., which included different variables like BMI, the diameter of MPD, drain fluid amylase level (DFA) on postoperative day (POD) 1, drain fluid lipase level on POD 1, and decreased rate of DFA.
evaluation/confidence:
* **Statistical Confidence**:
  * **CIs**: Yes - 95% Confidence Intervals are reported for the Area Under the Curve (AUC) values.
    * Nomogram AUC: 0.679 (95% CI, 0.645–0.713)
    * AI Model AUC: 0.672 (95% CI, 0.637–0.706)
  * **p-values**: Yes - P-values are reported for the AUC values.
    * Nomogram AUC: P < 0.001
    * AI Model AUC: P < 0.001
